Tests the immutability of `Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY` by attempting to delete it.

# Purpose
This code is a simple assertion test that checks the immutability of the `Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY` property in JavaScript. The `assert` statement verifies that attempting to delete `Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY` returns `false`, confirming that this property cannot be removed or altered. This test ensures compliance with the ECMAScript specification, which defines `Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY` as a non-configurable property. The code provides narrow functionality, focusing solely on validating the behavior of this specific property.
